title: Polish Skillet Dish
description: A hearty and comforting Polish-inspired skillet recipe with mighty ingredients.
instructions: Cook the mighty sausages in a skillet over medium-high heat until browned.
Add the cubed polish rye bread to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 5-7 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and top with shredded cheese.
Return the skillet to the oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
